content.en:
"The Blood Refining Sect is just a small force, and it doesn't even have a half-step transcendent realm, but I didn't expect that there are a lot of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds, if it weren't for the information of the Sky Pavilion, I wouldn't know this secret. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Peeping Heaven Pavilion knew the information of the Blood Refining Sect, why didn't he snatch it, this should be the rule of Peeping Heaven Pavilion.

Peeping Heaven Pavilion knows a lot of intelligence secrets, if any secret benefit has to be snatched, then Peep Heavenly Pavilion is not a force that sells intelligence, and its nature has changed.

Therefore, Peeping Heaven Pavilion did not do anything, otherwise the news would not be conducive to Peeping Heavenly Pavilion selling information.

Like Ye Tian was targeted by Peeping Heaven Pavilion at the beginning, mainly because he had traded too many super-dimensional treasure coins from Peeping Heavenly Pavilion, and even the super-dimensional realm was excited!

And the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed is not enough to make the extradimensional realm excited.

The most important thing is that although the Blood Refining Sect is a small force, any half-step extradimensional realm can destroy it, but the Blood Refining Sect is one of the subordinate forces under the command of the Refining Treasure Building, mining a superdimensional material for it-Blood Refining Gem.

The Treasure Refining Building is the most powerful force in the Treasure Refining Realm, and it is also the holy place in the hearts of the Treasure Alchemists, I don't know how many extradimensional realms there are, and the Heavenly Pavilion does not dare to provoke the 883 Treasure Refining Building.

Therefore, directly destroying the Blood Refining Sect and seizing the Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed of the Black Scale Domain is undoubtedly the most stupid way.

Of course, Ye Tian would not directly snatch the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed of the Blood Refining Sect, he was here to trade.

Of course.

He still won't trade with his real identity, the bloodline seed of the Black Scale Domain Dragon Clan is nothing, but if he trades this bloodline seed, the outside world will inevitably guess that he has the method of domain dragon transformation.

For many extra-dimensional forces, the value of the domain dragon transformation method is very high, if a super-dimensional force has multiple half-step extra-dimensional realms that have carried out the domain dragon transformation method, they have all mastered the black scale domain realm, and the combination of multiple black scale domain realms is enough to suppress the strength of the top half-step super-dimensional realm to the point that it is difficult to move, so that it can be easily killed.

Therefore, the multiple half-step transcendent realms that have been transformed by the Black Scale Domain Dragon Transformation Method are enough to surround and kill the most powerful half-step transcendent realms, and their value is very high, and they can break into some dangerous half-step transcendent realm forbidden places.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai will not reveal his identity.

Thereupon.

He copied the body of the god of the Ziya Realm, and directly possessed the ability of the Black (Caah) Scale Realm, but his combat power was not very powerful.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the Blood Refining Sect as a copy of the body of the God of the Ziya Realm and came to visit.

A half-step transcendent realm visited the Blood Refining Sect, and the Blood Refining Sect naturally did not dare to slack off.

Although they said that they had taken refuge in the Treasure Refining Building, they actually couldn't mobilize any of the strength of the Treasure Refining Building, this was just a false backer, how could they dare to offend a half-step transcendent realm!

Soon.

Ye Tian sat in the main hall of the sect master of the Blood Refining Sect, and sat with the old man of the Blood Refining Sect.

"Blood Refining Sect Master, I came to your Blood Refining Sect this time, and I actually want to trade the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed of the Blood Refining Sect!"

Ye Tian said directly.

"Ah, respected Ziya Realm God, where does our Blood Refining Sect have the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed, the Black Scale Domain Dragons are almost all half-step transcendent realms, where can we kill the Black Scale Domain Dragon!" The Blood Refining Sect Master directly denied.

Ye Tian smiled and said: "Blood Refining Sect Master, I bought the information from the Sky Refining Pavilion, hundreds of extradimensional epochs ago, your Blood Refining Sect found a heavily injured and dying Black Scale Domain Dragon in a treasure land, paid a certain price to kill the Black Scale Domain Dragon, used this Black Scale Domain Dragon to extract a lot of bloodline seeds, and also sold the scales and bones of the Black Scale Domain Dragon to the Treasure Refining Building, although this matter was hidden, but it could not be concealed from the Sky Refining Pavilion. "

The Blood Refining Sect Master's face changed, but he didn't expect the Sky Peer Pavilion to know this information.

The Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline Race is of little value to the general half-step Transcendent Realm, because without the method of domain dragon transformation, it is impossible to use the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed at all.

But Ye Tian wants to buy the Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline Race, so does it mean that Ye Tian has the method of domain dragon transformation or the forces behind him have the method of domain dragon transformation?

No matter what the case is, the other party must be bound to obtain the Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed of the Black Scale Domain!

Of course, the Blood Refining Sect can also not be sold, but it is very unwise to offend a half-step extradimensional realm!

Seeing that the Blood Refining Sect Master's face had changed many times and hesitating, Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "Blood Refining Sect Master, it is useless for you to ask for the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed, it is better to exchange it for Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, you can buy more resources, maybe you can cultivate a half-step Super Dimensional Realm for the Blood Refining Sect." "

"Ziya Realm God, how much can you bid?"

It is difficult to calculate the value of the Dragon Bloodline Seed of the Black Scale Domain, because for the ordinary half-step transcendent realm, 10,000 garnabular treasure coins are not willing to be paid, but if you need it, you can pay a big price for the half-step transcendent realm.

Ye Tian knew that the former Grand Leader of the Ice Ghost Organization had paid 50 million Galanbao coins to buy a drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood at an auction, and the value of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood was not as good as Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed.

The Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Blood Seed must only be refined within a short period of time after the death of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and a special preservation method is required, while the Black Scale Domain Dragon's true blood does not need a fresh corpse, even after falling many extradimensional eras, the Black Scale Domain Dragon's true blood can still be extracted from the Black Scale Domain Dragon's bloodline.

But even if the price of the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed was higher than 50 million Gala Blue Treasure Coins, it would only require a maximum of 100 million Super Dimensional Treasure Coins.

Thereupon. []

Ye Tian opened the price and said, "60 million Blue Treasure Coins, a drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed!"

The Blood Refining Sect Master shook his head, "Not enough!"

Ye Tian said coldly: "Blood Refining Headquarters, if you take it out and sell it, you won't even be able to sell it for 10,000 Jialanbao coins." "

The Blood Refining Sect Master said: "For some forces in need, he is worth this price, if our Blood Refining Sect wants to sell it, it will be sold openly a long time ago, and there will definitely be forces to buy it." "

Ye Tian didn't speak, he knew that the Blood Refining Sect Master could indeed be sold openly, and he would sell it at a higher price.

However, this will take a long time, and during this period, it will also cause the greed of some forces, which may lead to annihilation, which is one of the reasons why the Blood Refining Sect Master does not dare to do this.

Another point, the Blood Refining Sect is probably also looking for a way to transform the domain dragon.

"70,000,000 Galanbao coins!"

Ye Tian continued to increase the price.

However, the Blood Refining Sect Master still shook his head.

"80,000,000 Galanbao Coins!"

"Not enough!"

"90,000,000 Galanbao Coins!"

"It's still not enough!"

"One billion gar blue treasure coin, this is my bottom line!" Ye Tian said coldly.
